title: Enterprise onboarding churn — Q1 interview synthesis
author: UX Research
content: We interviewed 12 enterprise admins in January. The dominant pattern: teams stall in the first 14 days when SSO setup fails or requires IT approval loops. Participants described "weeks of back-and-forth" before their org could invite end users. Three of five churned accounts cited onboarding friction as the primary cancellation reason — not missing features. Key quote: "We bought the product in November but couldn't get our team in until February." Recommendation from research: reduce time-to-first-invite for enterprise admins and surface a checklist for IT prerequisites.

title: Assumption: Enterprise churn is driven by missing integrations
author: Sarah Chen, PM
content: We believe enterprise customers churn because we lack native Salesforce and Jira integrations. Evidence: 4 exit interviews mentioned integrations. We will know this is true if integration requests correlate with churn in Productboard. Status: Active. Owner: Sarah Chen. Last reviewed: February 2026.

title: Productboard feedback cluster — onboarding complaints
author: Product Ops
content: Cluster analysis (Feb 2026): 47 feedback items tagged onboarding. Top themes: SSO configuration (18), invite workflow confusion (11), lack of admin progress visibility (9). Revenue impact estimate: $240k ARR in accounts mentioning onboarding in last 90 days. Note: integration requests appear in only 6 items — lower volume than onboarding friction.

title: Decision record — Q1 roadmap prioritization
author: Head of Product
content: Decision: Prioritize Salesforce connector for Q1 over onboarding improvements. Rationale: largest deal in pipeline requested Salesforce. Dissent: Research lead noted onboarding research from January was not consulted. Assumption linked: enterprise churn driven by integrations (see Assumption Register). Outcome tracking: TBD.

title: Slack #product-discovery — onboarding vs integrations debate
author: Research lead
content: Thread summary: Research lead flagged that Q1 Dovetail synthesis showed onboarding as primary churn driver, but roadmap decision prioritized integrations. PM responded that pipeline deal outweighs research signal. Research: "We already validated this in January — are we re-debating a closed question?" Action item: reconcile assumption register with latest interview data before committing eng resources.

title: Experiment log — SSO wizard A/B test (Q4 prior year)
author: Growth PM
content: Experiment: Guided SSO setup wizard vs. documentation-only flow. Result: +22% completion of SSO setup within 7 days. Not shipped — deprioritized for Q4 feature freeze. Hypothesis validated: admin guidance reduces onboarding stall. Recommendation archived: ship wizard when eng capacity allows.
